home.slogan: Rehearse the future in agent swarms, win after a hundred battles.
home.sectionDesc: Prediction engine on standby. Upload unstructured data to initialize a simulation.
home.step01Desc: Reality seed extraction & individual/collective memory & GraphRAG build
home.step02Desc: Entity-relation extraction & persona generation & env config & simulation params
home.step03Desc: Dual-platform simulation & auto parsing of prediction needs & temporal memory updates
home.step04Desc: ReportAgent tools & deep interaction with post-simulation environment
home.step05Desc: Chat with any agent in the simulated world & with ReportAgent
